name: Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana – Shishu
administered_by: Department of Financial Services, Ministry of Finance (MUDRA Ltd. / NCGTC)
retrieval_text: Entry-level collateral-free micro loan of up to Rs 50,000 under the Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana (PMMY), aimed at very small and first-time non-farm businesses in manufacturing, trading, and services, including allied agricultural activities. No collateral or third-party guarantee is required; loans are covered under the Credit Guarantee Fund for Micro Units (CGFMU). Available through public sector banks, private banks, regional rural banks, small finance banks, MFIs, and NBFCs.
